title: Technology
description: A technology detected on a website by Wappalyzer, including its category classification and version information.

slug.description: URL-friendly unique identifier for the technology.

cpe.description: Common Platform Enumeration (CPE) identifier for the technology.

versions.description: Detected version strings for the technology.

categories.description: Technology categories this technology belongs to.

trafficRank.description: Relative traffic rank of the website.

confirmedAt.description: Unix timestamp when the technology detection was confirmed.

slug.description: URL-friendly unique identifier for the category.
